post_credits_scene.text: In a forgotten corner of the world's oldest bookshop...
post_credits_scene.speaker: narrator

post_credits_scene.text: A new book appears on the shelf.
post_credits_scene.speaker: narrator

post_credits_scene.text: Its cover is white as snow. Its pages hum with unwritten potential.
post_credits_scene.speaker: narrator

post_credits_scene.text: On the spine, in letters that glow like starlight, a title forms:
post_credits_scene.speaker: narrator
